## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- **Browser + version:** [e.g. Safari 18, Chrome 130]
- **Device:** [e.g. Mac, iPhone, Windows]
- **App mode:** [demo / connected with real token]

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or browser console output.
